title.en: Ensure audit logs are not automatically deleted

prose.en: Ensure audit logs are not automatically deleted

description.en: The `max_log_file_action` setting determines how to handle the audit log file reaching the max file size. A value of `keep_logs` will rotate the logs but never delete old logs.

rationale.en: In high security contexts, the benefits of maintaining a long audit history exceed the cost of storing the audit history.

audit.en:
Set the following parameter in `/etc/audit/auditd.conf:`

```
max_log_file_action = keep_logs
```

remediation.en:
Set the following parameter in `/etc/audit/auditd.conf:`

```
max_log_file_action = keep_logs
```
